The read

Do you know how much heat and humidity move your ball?

Most golfers don't — and it quietly costs them greens. Altitude, temperature, humidity, and wind add or steal yards on every single shot, and they change with every course and every hour of the day. A rangefinder hands you the raw distance. It has no idea what that number actually plays like right now.

CaddieAI does. Just like a professional caddie reading the air and the wind, it gives you the one number — and the aim point — that matters for the shot in front of you.

The one number

Not the distance. The number that plays.

CaddieAI walks every adjustment out loud, so you can trust it — from your raw yardage to the club in your bag that actually flies it.

01

Target

Your real yardage to the pin, slope included.

02

Air & altitude

Thin, hot, dry air carries farther. Cool, dense air holds it back.

03

Wind

Head and tail wind stretch or shrink it; crosswind gives a push and an aim point.

04

Play it as

One number, matched to the club that flies it.

Sea level or six thousand feet.

Your home baseline travels with you. Every reading is the honest delta from what's normal for your game.

Your distances · real ballistics

Your numbers. Military-grade physics.

Tell CaddieAI how far you actually hit each club. From there it runs advanced ballistic ball-flight physics — the same exterior-ballistics math that guides artillery — to adapt every shot to the moment. Because drift is driven by time in the air, a floaty short iron gets pushed more than a punchy long one, and CaddieAI gives you both the yards and the side to aim.

📈

Your distances

Built on the carry you already hit each club.

🌪

Push & aim

Crosswind drift, with the exact side to favor.

🔒

Private

No account, no ads. Your bag stays on your phone.

On every hole

A professional caddie. A fraction of the price.

A great caddie knows the course, reads the wind, feels how the air is flying the ball, and tells you exactly where to aim. That read is worth strokes — and it usually costs a day's green fee. CaddieAI gives you the same conditions-adjusted club and aim point on every shot, on any course in the world, for the price of an app.
